name: Dwarf Treasures
description: Dwarf Treasures is a deep and captivating puzzle game that transports you to the heart of mysterious mountain caves. Your task is to navigate hundreds of unique levels, clearing the path to treasure by smashing ice blocks and overcoming other treacherous obstacles hidden deep within the earth. But simply matching stones and gems isnt enough! Discover new locations, uncover the secrets of the dwarven clan, and amass untold treasures in this epic adventure puzzle game, where strategy, luck, and fun combine perfectly!
instructions: Welcome to the dwarven mines Your goal is to complete all levels by fulfilling objectives collecting treasures destroying obstacles and reaching target scores Move the crystals to form lines of 3 or more to get as far as possible
